# Gurdharam Jeet Singh

> AI Engineer & Full Stack Web/App Developer based in Muktsar & Bathinda, Punjab, India.

## Services

- [Web Development](https://gurdharam.com/services/web-development): High-end 2D & 3D web platforms built for Chandigarh, Ludhiana, Bathinda, and international markets.
- [AI & WhatsApp Automation](https://gurdharam.com/services/ai-automation): Custom 24/7 WhatsApp AI agents (healthcare, hospitals, clinics, gyms, travel) and automated content creation pipelines.
- [Crop Disease Detection App Development](https://gurdharam.com/services/crop-disease-detection-app): Offline AI agritech mobile solutions.
- [Dairy Management App Flutter](https://gurdharam.com/services/dairy-management-app-flutter): Flutter-based rural offline milk ledgers.
- [Offline AI App Development](https://gurdharam.com/services/offline-ai-app-development): Embedded ML/edge computing.
- [Web Developer Muktsar Punjab](https://gurdharam.com/services/web-developer-muktsar-punjab): Local web development and digital systems.

## Case Studies

- [DoodHisaab](https://gurdharam.com/case-studies/doodhisaab): Offline milk accounting ledger app for rural Punjab.
- [Fasal Doctor](https://gurdharam.com/case-studies/fasal-doctor): Camera-based crop disease diagnosis app.
